channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from trusted sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇬🇱 All-female Senate delegation heads to Arctic amid growing military tensions
item.description: A bipartisan group of female US senators is traveling to Greenland and Arctic nations for briefings on Arctic defense and strategic competition, highlighting growing concerns about military activity in the High North.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 Rubio pushes NATO allies at key summit amid uncertainty over US commitments
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is casting doubt on NATO's relevance after key allies resisted backing Washington's positions, continuing to pressure European partners on burden-sharing.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇨🇳 India's $9 billion island megaport project sharpens China's Malacca dilemma
item.description: The Great Nicobar megaport project would give India strategic monitoring capabilities near the Strait of Malacca, a critical chokepoint for Chinese trade and energy shipments.

item.title: 🇵🇱🇪🇺 NATO allies welcome Trump reversal on Poland troops, call for better coordination
item.description: NATO foreign ministers welcomed the US decision to station 5,000 additional troops in Poland, after days of confusion over cancelled deployments raised concerns about US reliability.

item.title: 🇺🇦 What the world gets wrong about Ukraine after four years of war
item.description: Analysis examining how international perceptions of Ukraine have shifted since Russia's full-scale invasion began, and what policymakers misunderstand about Ukraine's position and needs.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Refinery 700km from Border
item.description: Ukrainian forces attacked a Russian oil refinery in Yaroslavl, about 435 miles from the Ukrainian border, President Zelenskiy said. It is the latest in a series of Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil facilities.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇺🇳 France Drafts UN Resolution on Hormuz as US Text Stalls
item.description: France has drafted a UN Security Council resolution to restore movement in the Strait of Hormuz and could submit it if conditions are right. The move comes as Washington struggles to bring a text to vote that Russia and China may see as biased against Tehran.

item.title: 📉⛽ US Consumer Sentiment Hits Record Low on Iran War Fears
item.description: US consumer sentiment fell to a record low in May as surging gasoline prices linked to the Iran war intensified affordability concerns. The data highlights broader dissatisfaction with President Trump's handling of the economy.

item.title: 🇶🇦🤝 Qatari Negotiating Team Arrives in Tehran for Iran Deal Push
item.description: A Qatari negotiating team has arrived in Tehran to help secure a US-Iran deal to end the war, a source said. Doha, which has worked as a mediator in the Gaza war, had until now distanced itself from a mediation role in the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Strikes Iran: Missile Defense Tested, Civilian Areas Hit
item.description: Israel launched retaliatory strikes against Iran following Iranian missile attacks. The conflict has tested Israel's missile defense systems while hitting civilian areas, marking a significant escalation in regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Marine Corps Tests Helicopter as Mobile Drone Command Center
item.description: The US Marine Corps is testing the use of helicopters as mobile command centers for drone operations, a concept that could revolutionize how the military deploys unmanned systems in contested environments.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Part of Fentanyl Smuggling Route, US Official Says
item.description: A US official says Japan is part of the fentanyl smuggling route, highlighting the drug trade's expansion beyond traditional trafficking corridors and raising questions about Japan's role in the illicit supply chain.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Qatar Launches Fresh Tehran Push for US-Iran War Deal
item.description: Qatar has launched a new diplomatic effort in Tehran to help broker an end to the US-Iran war, building on its previous mediation experience in regional conflicts.

item.title: 🇲🇾 Malaysia Opposition to Contest Johor State Election
item.description: Malaysia's opposition Perikatan Nasional coalition will contest the upcoming Johor state election, setting the stage for a significant political battle in one of Malaysia's key states.

item.title: 🇨🇭 Switzerland Expands Sanctions Against Russia and Belarus
item.description: Switzerland expanded its sanctions lists against Russia and Belarus, adopting parts of the European Union's latest package of measures over Moscow's war in Ukraine, the government announced.

item.title: 🇧🇾 Belarus Will Not Be Dragged Into Ukraine War, Lukashenko Says
item.description: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko said Belarus would not be dragged into the Ukraine war but would defend itself if attacked, an apparent effort to distance Minsk from deeper involvement in Russia's invasion.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump to Appoint Warsh as Fed Chair
item.description: President Trump is expected to appoint Kevin Warsh as the new Federal Reserve Chair, a move that could reshape US monetary policy amid economic uncertainty from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Trump Announces 5,000 More Troops for Poland
item.description: President Trump announced the US will send an additional 5,000 troops to Poland, strengthening the American military presence on NATO's eastern flank amid tensions with Russia.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Airstrike Kills Iranian Commander
item.description: An Israeli airstrike killed a high-ranking Iranian military commander, further escalating tensions between the two nations as the regional conflict continues.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Fires Missiles at Israel in Retaliation
item.description: Iran launched missiles at Israel in retaliation for Israeli strikes, marking a significant escalation in the conflict between the two nations and raising fears of broader regional war.

item.title: 🇦🇫 Taliban Legitimizing Child Marriage Under New Law
item.description: Activists warn that Afghanistan's Taliban government is legitimizing child marriage through new legislation, rolling back decades of progress on women's and children's rights.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey Shuts Down Liberal Istanbul University in Criminal Probe
item.description: Turkey has shuttered a liberal Istanbul university after it was seized in a criminal investigation, continuing a crackdown on academic freedom and dissent.

item.title: 🇸🇳 Senegal PM Defends LGBTQ Crackdown, Slams West's 'Homosexual Tyranny'
item.description: Senegal's prime minister defended the country's LGBTQ crackdown and criticized Western pressure as 'homosexual tyranny,' highlighting tensions between African nations and Western governments over human rights.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Lebanon's Military Pushes Back Against US Sanctions
item.description: Lebanon's military is pushing back against US sanctions, asserting its loyalty solely to the nation amid pressure from Washington over alleged ties to Hezbollah.

item.title: 🇵🇸 Israeli Army Admits Killing 3 Palestinians in Gaza Despite Ceasefire
item.description: The Israeli army admitted to killing three Palestinians in Gaza despite an ongoing ceasefire, raising questions about the durability of the truce and the safety of civilians in the enclave.
